title: Self-Audit Result
description: Schema for auditing a previous response. Used to prevent self-justification: a previous output is re-evaluated by its telemetry, not preserved by default.

previous_response_id.description: Identifier of the response being audited.

original_telemetry.description: Telemetry captured at the time the response was generated.

audit_trigger.description: What caused this audit to run.

audit_result.description: Outcome of the audit. The previous response is not preserved by default.

revision_required.description: If true, a corrected response must be generated.

notes.description: Free-text notes about what was found in the audit.
